results.validation_notes: The previous classification conflated what Dagster enables (pipe-and-filter data pipelines for users) with Dagster's own architecture. The codebase is a modular monorepo framework, not microservices—each 'library' is an integration adapter, not an independent service. No DDD patterns (aggregates, bounded contexts) or event-driven structures (event handlers, message brokers) are evident in the source structure. The 30+ libraries under python_modules/libraries/ are plugin-style integrations (dagster-dbt, dagster-snowflake, dagster-k8s) that extend the core platform, which is characteristic of modular monolith architecture with adapter/hexagonal patterns.
